title: Skill SKILL.md frontmatter tier block
description: Validates the tier governance fields added to any skill's YAML frontmatter. All fields are optional for tier-0 (manual-only) skills; required for tier >= 1.

current.description: Current promotion tier. 0 = manual/supervised only. ONLY a human (Jed) may edit this field — tier_gate.sh recommends but never self-promotes.

target.description: The tier this skill is currently accumulating evidence toward.

allowed_executors.description: Executors permitted to run this skill. tier >= 1 adds copilot; tier >= 2 adds agy with write surface.

allowed_phases.description: Explicit phase allowlist — never a wildcard. Only phases listed here may be invoked in unattended execution.

max_iterations_per_phase.description: Hard cap on loop iterations per phase. Raised only by explicit promotion. Never 'unlimited'.

stop_condition.description: Objective, observable stop condition for unattended runs. Never 'when_satisfied' or open-ended prose.

output_format.description: What the run surfaces to the human. git_diff_only is required below tier 3 — Jed should never be assembling phase outputs manually.

requires_digest.description: When true, the executor must emit digest.json with files_touched[] + external_effects[] on every run.

requires_sentinel.description: When true, the executor's result.md must end with the exact literal 'STATUS: COMPLETE' as its final line.
